schema.description: Premium iOS app to manage wine and spirits collections: scanning, organizing, and AI-powered tracking.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Alcotheque.

q1.question: What is Alcotheque?
q1.answer: Alcotheque is an iOS app to manage your wine and spirits collection. Scan your bottles with AI, organize your cellar by location, track your collection value and keep a history of every gift received.

q2.question: Is Alcotheque free?
q2.answer: Yes, Alcotheque is free to download. The free version lets you manage up to 15 bottles. The Premium subscription at $0.99/month gives you unlimited bottles, locations and scans.

q3.question: What devices does Alcotheque work on?
q3.answer: Alcotheque is available on iPhone and iPad running iOS 17 or later. iCloud sync keeps your collection up to date across all your Apple devices.

q4.question: How does the AI bottle scanning work?
q4.answer: Simply take a photo of your bottle label. The AI automatically recognizes the name, type, vintage and estimated value. You can then edit the information before saving.

q5.question: Does Alcotheque manage both wine AND spirits?
q5.answer: Yes, that is what sets Alcotheque apart from competitors. The app manages over 30 drink types: red, white and rosé wines, champagnes, whiskies, rums, gins, cognacs, vodkas and much more.

q6.question: Is my data secure?
q6.answer: Yes. All your data is securely stored on Firebase (Google Cloud) and synchronized in real time. Your collection is protected and accessible only from your account.

history.question: Can I track the complete history of my bottles?
history.answer: Yes. Alcotheque records the full history of each bottle: purchase date, opening, tasting, gift given or received. You get a complete timeline for every bottle in your collection.

cta.title: Your cellar deserves better than an Excel spreadsheet.
